allow: Bash(cd /d/Coding/PMI && python -c " import plotly.graph_objects as go fig = go.Figure\(go.Indicator\( mode='gauge+number+delta', value=0.935, delta={'reference': 1.0, 'valueformat': '.3f', 'increasing': {'color': '#4ade80'}, 'decreasing': {'color': '#f87171'}}, number={'valueformat': '.3f', 'font': {'size': 38, 'color': '#f87171'}}, title={'text': 'CPI', 'font': {'size': 13, 'color': '#7a8499'}}, gauge={ 'axis': { 'range': [0, 1.75], 'tickmode': 'array', 'tickvals': [0, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0, 1.25, 1.5, 1.75], 'ticktext': ['0', '0.5', '0.75', '1.0', '1.25', '1.5', '1.75'], 'tickfont': {'size': 9, 'color': '#7a8499'}, 'tickcolor': '#252d3d', 'tickwidth': 1, }, 'bar': {'color': '#f87171', 'thickness': 0.18}, 'bgcolor': '#161b27', 'borderwidth': 0, 'steps': [ {'range': [0.00, 0.75], 'color': 'rgba\(248,113,113,0.20\)'}, {'range': [0.75, 0.90], 'color': 'rgba\(251,191,36,0.18\)'}, {'range': [0.90, 1.00], 'color': 'rgba\(251,191,36,0.10\)'}, {'range': [1.00, 1.25], 'color': 'rgba\(74,222,128,0.16\)'}, {'range': [1.25, 1.75], 'color': 'rgba\(74,222,128,0.28\)'}, ], 'threshold': {'line': {'color': '#7aa2f7', 'width': 2.5}, 'thickness': 0.82, 'value': 1.0}, }, \)\) fig.update_layout\(paper_bgcolor='#161b27', height=260, margin=dict\(l=24,r=24,t=50,b=16\)\) print\('Gauge OK — plotly', __import__\('plotly'\).__version__\) " 2>&1)
